name: Numeric-aggregation-on-non-numeric probe (iter 4)
description: Tests NumericAggregationOnNonNumericRule (rewrites AVG/SUM on nvarchar columns to COUNT(*)). 1 target case + 3 cumulative controls (iter 1, iter 2, iter 3).

Scenarios.Question: regions where outages exceed the regional average
Scenarios.Notes: From B-SUB-009. Previously: AVG(Outages.OutageNumber) → 'nvarchar invalid for avg'. With the new rule, that AVG should be rewritten to COUNT(*).

Scenarios.Question: top 5 customers by total bill amount
Scenarios.Notes: Control iter 1 — SUM(Bills.TotalAmount) is numeric, must NOT be rewritten to COUNT.

Scenarios.Question: list every region with its parent region
Scenarios.Notes: Control iter 2 — unresolved ParentRegion.NameEn still gets dropped.

Scenarios.Question: active customers in the West region with at least one payment
Scenarios.Notes: Control iter 3 — filter-value-hallucination clause still active (no descriptive strings as values).

Scenarios.Question: average bill amount
Scenarios.Notes: Control basic AVG — Bills.TotalAmount IS numeric, must NOT be rewritten. Verifies rule is selective.
